creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 247473
handbrake-1.7.2.patch

HandBrake 1.7.2 has been released in a short term. See the release note for details.

https://github.com/HandBrake/HandBrake/releases/tag/1.7.2

The attached `handbrake-1.7.2.patch` updates the multimedia/handbrake port to 1.7.2.
Please apply to the Ports tree.
